initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    stores.store_name,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN deliveries.delivery_status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(orders.order_id) AS delivered_ratio
FROM orders
JOIN stores ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id
JOIN deliveries ON orders.order_id = deliveries.delivery_order_id
GROUP BY stores.store_id, stores.store_name
ORDER BY COUNT(orders.order_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH store_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.store_id,
        s.store_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) AS delivered_orders
    FROM stores s
    JOIN orders o ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    JOIN deliveries d ON o.order_id = d.delivery_order_id
    GROUP BY s.store_id, s.store_name
    ORDER BY total_orders DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    store_name,
    CAST(delivered_orders AS REAL) / total_orders AS delivered_ratio
FROM store_order_stats;

WITH store_order_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        s.store_id,
        s.store_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) AS delivered_orders
    FROM stores s
    JOIN orders o ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    JOIN deliveries d ON o.order_id = d.delivery_order_id
    GROUP BY s.store_id, s.store_name
)
SELECT 
    store_name,
    CAST(delivered_orders AS REAL) / total_orders AS delivered_ratio
FROM store_order_stats
ORDER BY total_orders DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    stores.store_name,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN deliveries.delivery_status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(orders.order_id) AS delivered_ratio
FROM stores
JOIN orders ON orders.store_id = stores.store_id
LEFT JOIN deliveries ON orders.order_id = deliveries.delivery_order_id
GROUP BY stores.store_id, stores.store_name
ORDER BY COUNT(orders.order_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH store_order_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.store_id,
        s.store_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) AS delivered_orders
    FROM stores s
    JOIN orders o ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    JOIN deliveries d ON o.order_id = d.delivery_order_id
    GROUP BY s.store_id, s.store_name
    ORDER BY total_orders DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    store_name,
    CAST(delivered_orders AS REAL) / total_orders AS delivered_ratio
FROM store_order_counts;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH store_order_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.store_id,
        s.store_name,
        COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) AS delivered_orders
    FROM stores s
    JOIN orders o ON o.store_id = s.store_id
    JOIN deliveries d ON o.order_id = d.delivery_order_id
    GROUP BY s.store_id, s.store_name
    ORDER BY total_orders DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    store_name,
    CAST(delivered_orders AS REAL) / total_orders AS delivered_ratio
FROM store_order_counts;
